title: DonutNV
description: Simple & Lightweight DonutSMP Inspired /NV,, with identical messages and identical effects.
body:
## Donut Night Vision
A lightweight, quality-of-life mod designed for DonutSMP.net that provides permanent full-bright night vision, ensuring you can see perfectly in dark areas, deep caves, or during the night cycle.

##⚡ Features
Permanent Full-Bright: See clearly anywhere in the world without the need for torches or brewing potions.

100% Client-Side: Everything runs entirely on your own computer.

Lightweight & Fast: Built with minimal code to guarantee your game's FPS stays completely smooth.

##🔧 Zero Setup Required
Unlike complex auction house or economy mods, Donut Night Vision does not require any configuration.

No Discord account linking required.

No API keys needed.

No in-game commands to run.

Simply drop the mod into your mods folder and jump right onto the server!

##🔒 Privacy & Safety
Because this mod is entirely client-side and does not rely on the DonutSMP API, it never connects to external servers, sends background web requests, or tracks your data. It is 100% independent and safe to use.
